subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! I bear witness to Thy oneness and Thy singleness, and that Thou art the First and the Last [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی اشهد بوحدانیتک و فردانیتک و بانک انت الاول و الاخر و
subcodes.subjects: @prayers (general or uncategorized), @transcendence; unknowability of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
